silhouette_language: A classic Reversi/Othello set: a flat green-felt 8x8 board with thin grid lines and a raised moulded black frame; the playing pieces are smooth round discs, one side glossy black, the other glossy white.
vision_style_brief: A realistic classic Reversi board game: a deep green felt play surface with thin dark grid lines, a glossy moulded black plastic frame, and high-contrast glossy pieces -- pure black on one side, pure white on the other. Clean, product-like, modern tabletop look. NOT: fantasy stone/wood, warm candlelit mood, muddy low-contrast pieces.
anti_style: warm fantasy wood or stone materials
muddy grey or low-contrast pieces (they must read pure black vs pure white)
